heading: Disenrollment
label: 3905 Disenrollment
text: Members of the Auxiliary may be disenrolled pursuant to applicable regulations.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesExperience has shown that it is desirable to have a statute definitely providing for separation of Auxiliarists from the organization. 81st Congress, House Report No. 557.
Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 824 of this title
amendments: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 824 of this title
